@graph.name: Custom Software Development
@graph.description: DASTUTE builds bespoke web applications, mobile apps, enterprise platforms, APIs, and microservices using modern frameworks and agile methodologies. From requirements discovery to post-launch support.

@graph.name: Cloud Migration & Management
@graph.description: End-to-end cloud services including strategy, migration, architecture, and ongoing management across AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.

@graph.name: Cybersecurity Services
@graph.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity including penetration testing, security audits, GDPR and ISO 27001 compliance, 24/7 SOC monitoring, and incident response.

@graph.name: AI & Data Solutions
@graph.description: Machine learning model development, predictive analytics, NLP, data engineering pipelines, business intelligence dashboards, and generative AI integration.

@graph.name: IT Consulting
@graph.description: Technology strategy, digital transformation planning, IT governance, vendor selection, and programme management for organisations at any stage of maturity.

@graph.name: Managed IT Services
@graph.description: 24/7 proactive IT monitoring, helpdesk and end-user support, patch management, business continuity, disaster recovery, and IT asset management.
